MINI MINUTES FOR APR-07-26 09:00 AM FOR DEPT 301

LAW AND MOTION 301, MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT OF FRIENDS OF MINT PLAZA UNDER CCP 473(B). THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: GRANTED. GOOD CAUSE SHOWN AND NO OPPOSITION FILED. THE DEFAULT OF FRIENDS OF MINT PLAZA ENTERED ON NOVEMBER 6, 2025 IS VACATED AND FRIENDS OF MINT PLAZA MUST FILE ITS PROPOSED ANSWER NO LATER THAN APRIL 21, 2026. PROPOSED ORDER SUBMITTED. JUDGE: HAROLD E. KAHN, CLERK: E. LARNAUTI, NOT REPORTED

MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
Off Calendar Apr-07-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT OF FRIENDS OF MINT PLAZA UNDER CCP 473 (B)

No appearances. The court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: Defendant Friends of Mint Plaza motion to set aside default is granted. Good cause shown and no opposition filed. The default of Friends of Mint Plaza entered on November 6, 2025 is vacated and Friends of Mint Plaza must file its proposed answer no later than April 21, 2026. Proposed order submitted. Judge: Harold E. Kahn, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported (301/HEK)
